flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Sitting Bull College are 39% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($28.5k vs $46.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Sitting Bull College rose 200% between 2008 and 2011 (25.0% → 75.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Sitting Bull College rose 103% between 2021 and 2024 (10.6% → 21.6%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Sitting Bull College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (216 → 257).
